Interface ImageServiceInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

A class that provides information on an ArcGIS server image service.

[Guid("BFCD28A7-B02F-4C5D-AA7E-D0BA474D5192")]
public interface ImageServiceInfo : IImageServiceInfo
